title: classic piece in EoE
wikitext:
[]: classic piece in EoE?             Quote Post by advent_child » Mon Oct 04, 2004 12:23 pm What's this classic piece that it's played in EoE in the 36:00-39:00 minutes?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 04, 2004 2:03 pm Too lazy to pop EoE into the DVD-ROM... What scene is it during?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Oct 04, 2004 2:28 pm I would assume you're talking about Air by Bach. It plays during Asuka's fight with the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Oct 04, 2004 2:38 pm coff wrote: I would assume you're talking about Air by Bach. It plays during Asuka's fight with the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Oct 04, 2004 4:17 pm the_seventh_child wrote: i was wondering why is this played during the fight with the mp evas?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Oct 04, 2004 6:19 pm because it serves as a juxaposition to the violence and mayhem on the screen...

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Tue Oct 05, 2004 1:17 am It serves to contrast and intensify the horror of the scene.

[]:             Quote Post by advent_child » Tue Oct 05, 2004 6:13 am the_seventh_child wrote: coff wrote: I would assume you're talking about Air by Bach. It plays during Asuka's fight with the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Oct 05, 2004 7:38 am advent_child wrote: oh yeah..i knew it..just had a lot of time to hear it..it reminded me something familiar..it's really a masterpiece...

[]:             Quote Post by advent_child » Tue Oct 05, 2004 11:02 am the_seventh_child wrote: Have you forget those precious moments we had together when we were kids and we were listening this from the house of the old man classic-freak? :cry: Anyway to get to topic indeed this is a masterpiece..and it's really great to see Eva-02 kicks ass,Asuka screaming,along with this great piece...

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Tue Oct 05, 2004 12:12 pm It's the song to cut up whales by. Didn't you all know that? I always put that on when I'm gutting fish or something.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Oct 05, 2004 5:25 pm er...whales? you mean the MP evas? lol...funny... and it is really nice... but it seems really hard to play...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Oct 06, 2004 4:20 am Ayanami wrote: It's the song to cut up whales by. Didn't you all know that? I always put that on when I'm gutting fish or something.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Oct 06, 2004 8:54 am funny...though i find the MP evas to be more like birds...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 06, 2004 10:06 am sadsadshinji wrote: funny...though i find the MP evas to be more like birds...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Oct 06, 2004 9:15 pm especially with the teeth... but what was with the MP eva design...it has to mean something...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 06, 2004 10:47 pm sadsadshinji wrote: especially with the teeth...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Oct 07, 2004 9:02 am maybe some bible mythology?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Oct 07, 2004 5:13 pm Maybe just to be frightening? You think?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 07, 2004 5:24 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Maybe just to be frightening? You think?
